title: Episode 13: Trauma Edition — Vol. 1, Issue 2
description: Today's trauma edition examines six diverse studies spanning surgical techniques, drug delivery innovations, and implant complications. We explore a novel curved guide system for vertebroplasty that combines single-puncture simplicity with bilateral-quality cement distribution, achieving superior pain relief compared to standard unilateral approaches. The episode covers emerging extracellular vesicle platforms for drug delivery, offering biological alternatives to synthetic carriers with enhanced biocompatibility and targeting capabilities. We discuss groundbreaking research on resveratrol's targeting of iron metabolism pathways in disc degeneration, revealing ferritinophagy as a novel therapeutic target. Additionally, we review creatine supplementation's expanding evidence base beyond traditional performance enhancement, including applications for injury recovery and tactical populations. The program examines immune microenvironment profiling in angiosarcoma, where specific macrophage populations predict clinical outcomes and suggest targeted therapeutic approaches. Finally, we analyze mechanism failures in motorized lengthening nails, revealing material-specific failure patterns that inform device selection and patient counseling strategies.

title: Episode 6: Trauma Edition — Vol. 1, Issue 1
description: In this episode of OrthoDigest, we cover six open-access trauma studies examining a novel trans-symphyseal curved intramedullary device for anterior pelvic ring fractures, the impact of surgical timing on wound complications after ankle fracture fixation over a twenty-two-year dataset, a meta-analysis of three-dimensional printing and virtual planning in periarticular fracture surgery, circular external fixation as definitive single-stage treatment for gunshot humeral fractures in rural Kenya, the superiority of preoperative metabolic and nutritional indices over frailty scores for predicting complications after proximal humerus fracture surgery, and a large meta-analysis supporting reverse total shoulder arthroplasty over hemiarthroplasty and open reduction and internal fixation for geriatric proximal humerus fractures."Trans-symphyseal fixation for complex anterior pelvic fractures: a novel technique guide and case series" — Quercetti NF et al., OTA Int — title: Episode 5: Hand Edition — Vol. 1, Issue 1
description: In today's Hand edition, we compare recurrence rates of Dupuytren contracture after limited fasciectomy, needle aponeurotomy, and collagenase injection, examine whether early NSAID prescriptions increase scaphoid nonunion risk, and evaluate ultrasound-guided versus endoscopic carpal tunnel release in a multicenter matched cohort. We also review flexor tenolysis outcomes after zone 2-3 flexor tendon repairs, describe a concurrent bilateral arthroscopic approach to proximal pole scaphoid nonunion, and assess whether the Charlson Comorbidity Index and Charlson Fracture Index predict complications after distal radius fracture fixation."Likelihood of Dupuytren Contracture Recurrence After Limited Fasciectomy, Needle Aponeurotomy or Collagenase: Systematic Review of Prospective Data With 2- to 7-Year Follow-up" — Nocek M et al., Journal of Hand Surgery Global Online — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhsg.2026.100979"Early Nonsteroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drug Prescriptions and Nonunion After Scaphoid Fractures: A TriNetX Matched Cohort Study" — Phan A et al., Journal of Hand Surgery Global Online — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhsg.2026.100958"Prospective Multicenter Propensity Score-matched Comparison of Ultrasound-guided Versus Endoscopic Carpal Tunnel Release" — Marwin VM et al., Journal of Hand Surgery Global Online — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhsg.2026.100974"Clinical Outcomes of Flexor Tenolysis Following Zone 2-3 Flexor Tendon Repair: A Retrospective Review" — Shigley C et al., Journal of Hand Surgery Global Online — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhsg.2025.100941"Arthroscopic Bone Grafting in Bilateral Proximal Pole Scaphoid Fracture Nonunion: An Illustrated Description" — Ganesan DN et al., Journal of Wrist Surgery — https://doi.org/10.1055/s-0044-1796672"Association of Charlson Comorbidity Index and Charlson Fracture Index With Surgical Complications in Distal Radius Fractures: A Retrospective Review" — Parker AM et al., Journal of Hand Surgery Global Online — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhsg.2026.100959

title: Episode 4: Foot & Ankle Edition — Vol. 1, Issue 1
description: In today's Foot & Ankle edition, we examine whether the timing of ankle fracture fixation affects wound complication rates, compare open Broström, arthroscopic Broström, and lasso-loop techniques for lateral ankle instability, and evaluate the impact of 3D printing technology on articular fracture surgery outcomes. We also review subtalar arthroereisis implant removal rates in adult flatfoot correction, explore a novel non-opioid analgesic for post-bunionectomy pain, and compare two cases of peroneal tendon pathology to illustrate why anatomical findings must be interpreted in clinical context."Impact of surgical timing on wound complications following ankle fracture fixation: A 22-year retrospective cohort study" — Zahra W et al., Journal of Clinical Orthopaedics and Trauma — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcot.2026.103405"Meta-analysis of surgical approaches to lateral ankle instability: Open Broström versus arthroscopic Broström versus lasso-loop repair" — Cho T et al., Journal of Orthopaedics — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jor.2026.02.014"Impact of 3D technology on perioperative outcomes of articular and periarticular fractures: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCT studies" — Mazzola MA et al., Journal of Orthopaedics — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jor.2026.03.015"Removal rates of subtalar arthroereisis implants in adult flexible planovalgus correction: A case series" — Carter D et al., Journal of Orthopaedics — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jor.2026.02.028"Pregabalin naproxencarbil in acute post-bunionectomy pain: a randomized clinical trial" — Jiang GL et al., PAIN Reports — https://doi.org/10.1097/PR9.0000000000001424"Peroneus brevis tenosynovitis associated with hypertrophied peroneal tubercle: Comparative analysis of 2 cases and their etiologies" — Michailidis A et al., Radiology Case Reports — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.radcr.2026.02.001

title: Episode 3: Shoulder & Elbow Edition — Vol. 1, Issue 1
description: In today's Shoulder & Elbow edition, we examine whether intraoperative navigation improves outcomes in reverse total shoulder arthroplasty, explore the protective role of bisphosphonates in osteoporotic shoulder arthroplasty patients, and evaluate a novel metabolic-nutritional index for predicting complications after proximal humerus fracture surgery. We also cover the muscle advancement technique in combined rotator cuff and subscapularis tears, compare hyaluronic acid formulations for adhesive capsulitis, and ask whether distal humerus hemiarthroplasty outcomes differ between acute and salvage settings."The role of intraoperative navigation in reverse total shoulder arthroplasty and its impact on clinical outcomes" — Brian A et al., JSES Reviews, Reports & Techniques — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xrrt.2026.100687"Shoulder arthroplasty in the osteoporotic patient: do bisphosphonates make a difference?" — Adams NC et al., JSES International — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jseint.2026.101629"Does pre-operative metabolic and nutritional assessment have greater association with perioperative complications than frailty?" — Williamson TK et al., JSES Reviews, Reports & Techniques — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xrrt.2026.100686"Clinical outcomes of muscle advancement technique for arthroscopic rotator cuff repair: comparison between cases with and without subscapularis tears" — Okubo A et al., JSES International — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jseint.2026.101633"Intra-articular injection of high versus low molecular weight hyaluronic acid in adhesive capsulitis; randomized trial" — Mir M et al., Future Science OA — https://doi.org/10.1080/20565623.2025.2581460"Functional outcomes and complications of distal humerus hemiarthroplasty performed in acute versus salvage cases" — Gosselin C et al., JSES International — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jseint.2026.101639

title: Episode 2: Knee Edition — Vol. 1, Issue 1
description: In this knee edition, we review six open-access studies covering alignment philosophy and strength recovery in total knee arthroplasty, surgical decision-making for periprosthetic distal femur fractures, adductor canal block protocols for postoperative pain, the neuroscience of proprioceptive loss after ACL injury, and an in vitro strategy to prevent biofilm on polypropylene mesh used in revision knee surgery."Restricted kinematic alignment in total knee arthroplasty achieves equivalent or superior functional outcomes to mechanical alignment without compromising implant survivorship: A systematic review" — Merchant et al., J Orthop — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jor.2026.02.025"Temporal changes in quadriceps and hamstring strength and flexibility following total knee arthroplasty" — Shetty et al., J Orthop — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jor.2026.03.008"Open reduction and internal fixation versus distal femoral replacement for periprosthetic distal femur fractures: a systematic review and meta-analysis" — Brady et al., OTA Int — https://doi.org/10.1097/OI9.0000000000000475"No difference in pain control and hospitalisation length between single-shot adductor canal block and continuous adductor canal block in total knee arthroplasty: A systematic review and meta-analysis" — Migliorini et al., J Orthop — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jor.2026.02.024"Disrupted sensorimotor control after ACL injury: from mechanoreceptor degeneration to neuroplasticity-oriented rehabilitation" — Lee et al., Ann Med — https://doi.org/10.1080/07853890.2025.2604403"Pretreatment With Vancomycin Prevents Staphylococcal Biofilm Formation on Marlex Mesh" — Chao et al., Arthroplast Today — https://doi.org/10.1016/j.artd.2026.101985

title: Episode 1: Hip Edition — Vol. 1, Issue 1
